meaning: adv.涓嶈瘹瀹炲湴,涓嶆鐩村湴
examples: The key issue was whether the four defendants acted dishonestly.
Profit made dishonestly always brings trouble.
Profit made dishonestly always brings trouble.Always.
For, as stated above, I never duped anyone, nor do I deal dishonestly with anyone.
Sir John said his party would return donations if the money was "dishonestly obtained and dishonestly donated".
